problem id: 5b1b10d3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10101110 -> 11011010
  01011111 -> 10101001
  01101111 -> 00110001
  00111101 -> 10001001
  01111010 -> 00010011
  11101110 -> 11111011
  00001001 -> 00110011
  10000100 -> 10011111
  01011101 -> 10111001

query: 10111110
predicted answer: 01010010
